pipeline_status.analyst: ISS-700 Wave 1 complete (86→94 entries classified), ISS-702 blocked on Wave 3. Proposals ISS-700/ISS-702 status updates already processed by prior decider run — deleted from issue-proposals/ dir.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 68 pending reviews in digest (12 critical, 37 major, 15 moderate, 4 none). 67 under-covered processed reviews with 292 missing issues — systemic backlog from prior runs.

internal_issues.description: Section 6.8 titled 'WIN-012 Single-Pole Collapse' but WIN-012 is the coupling constant κ. The two-pole B(r) equation belongs to WIN-053.
IGRF coefficient count: 168 is wrong for degree 13. Correct is 195 (14^2-1).
Section claims two exponentials with same decay constant collapse to single exponential — false when r_N ≠ r_S. Assigned EXP-075.
Section claims d_geo is undefined — false, dome README defines it as spherical arc distance. Real critique is circular geometry reasoning. Assigned EXP-076.

Build schema mismatch: PRED_STD_RELABEL, PRED_TESTABLE etc use fields (derivation, testability) that don't exist. Placeholders permanently 0. Not yet rendered in HTML but create false impression of tracking.
No documented rule for restates_win + non-recycled verdict combinations. Attack surface for dome defender. Needs _meta taxonomy note.

patches_applied.description: SEC-6.8: WIN-012 → WIN-053 in title, TLDR, and body (3 patches)

systemic_observations: 67 under-covered processed reviews with 292 missing issues. Prior decider runs marked reviews as processed but did not create corresponding issues. This is a major backlog. Consider a dedicated issue-creation sweep across the under-covered reviews.

12 critical curmudgeon reviews examined this run. 2 stale (fixes already applied in prior runs). 4 assigned-analyst for major rewrites. 2 self-applied patches. 4 still need action (SEC-4.6.1, SEC-4.6.3, SEC-6.5, part6-sha256-recycling).

recommended_actions.action: Analyst: Work EXP-075 (SEC-6.8 mathematical error rewrite) and EXP-076 (SEC-4.5.9 d_geo rewrite)
Create EXP items for remaining unactioned critical reviews: SEC-4.6.1 (framing), SEC-4.6.3 (post_hoc miscategorization), SEC-6.5 (major rewrite), part6-sha256-recycling (new section needed)
